mission_03:
## What You Will Learn

Training a neural network requires two things: a **loss function** to measure error and an **optimizer** to update weights. This mission wires them together.

### Key Concepts
- **nn.CrossEntropyLoss**: The standard loss for multi-class classification. Internally applies softmax + negative log-likelihood. Expects raw logits (not probabilities).
- **optim.Adam**: Adaptive Moment Estimation. Combines momentum (speeds up convergence) and RMSprop (adaptive learning rates per parameter). The most widely used optimizer in deep learning.
- **model.parameters()**: Returns all trainable parameters (weights and biases) of the model. The optimizer needs this to know what to update.
- **lr (learning rate)**: Controls step size. Too high = unstable; too low = slow convergence. 0.001 is a common default.

### Why This Matters
Every training loop starts with this exact setup. CrossEntropyLoss + Adam is the bread and butter of deep learning.
